programmes.show_description: Buckle up as 50 all time party anthems are coming your way. Things are gonna get loud and very messy.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
Back into the archive for some classic Clubland tracks - some you will greet like an old friend, and maybe some you'd forgotten. How many can you remember?

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
The ultimate throwback! We're bringing you the hottest Clubland belters from 1990 to 1999. Dust off those dancing shoes and pump the party!
From Beats International in 1990 to the Wamdue Project in 1999 - Bam Bam presents 65 big party number 1s of the 1990s, back to back and in order.
Massive tunes and huge anthems. Each track a chart topping No.1 dance hit! This is the best of the best, these are the legends.
Nice One, Top One, Get Sorted with 30 tracks that defined an era. Join Utah Saints and experience the early 90s rave scene with the tracks that mattered. Where's the noisy people!
From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
We all love a bit of Eurodance toonage! Even more so when the songs topped the UK charts! Enjoy a couple of hours of some classic euro hits.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Thirty of the biggest beats of all time, from the 1990s to 2018 - and they've all sold a million! No single act appears twice in our chart, so expect a few surprises.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
We've opened the Clubland vaults and we are delving deep. Prepare for some less played deep dives and forgotten gems from archives!
30 tracks. One legendary era. Join Utah Saints and experience the early 90s warehouse rave scene with their ultimate setlist. This is for the Old Skool massive!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she chooses her 50 most iconic but very proper clubland classics of all time! Banger after banger, this will not disappoint.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Kiss FM legend Bam Bam with a mammoth session of no.1 beats that made the decade we now call the noughties! Starting with Chicane and ending with Gaga, via Spiller, Madonna and Cascada.
